title: Nova Fold Mark Design AI
sourceTitle: Nova Fold Mark Design AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: minimal optical-illusion logo mark built around NOVA FOLD. Subject: NOVA FOLD is the visible identity system, anchored by a central N letterform transformed into a folded geometric mark. Scene: Plain warm ivory or soft light gray identity-presentation background with one centered logo mark and no extra props. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 composition with one large centered mark, brand name underneath, optional subtitle below, generous negative space, and precise alignment. Style: Clean premium logo design with folded geometry, spatial depth, precise edges, strong negative space, and modern identity-system polish. Color Palette: Minimal black, white, and charcoal-gray palette on warm ivory or soft light gray with subtle tonal depth inside the mark. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: NOVA FOLD appears as the brand wordmark beneath the mark; Design Studio appears as a small restrained subtitle. Signature Elements: NOVA FOLD, N, precision, depth, folded geometry, and memorable spatial identity, and Design Studio define the reusable logo-mark mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Theme: minimal optical-illusion logo mark built around NOVA FOLD. Subject: NOVA FOLD is the visible identity system, anchored by a central N letterform transformed into a folded geometric mark. Scene: Plain warm ivory or soft light gray identity-presentation background with one centered logo mark and no extra props. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 composition with one large centered mark, brand name underneath, optional subtitle below, generous negative space, and precise alignment. Style: Clean premium logo design with folded geometry, spatial depth, precise edges, strong negative space, and modern identity-system polish. Color Palette: Minimal black, white, and charcoal-gray palette on warm ivory or soft light gray with subtle tonal depth inside the mark. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: NOVA FOLD appears as the brand wordmark beneath the mark; Design Studio appears as a small restrained subtitle. Signature Elements: NOVA FOLD, N, precision, depth, folded geometry, and memorable spatial identity, and Design Studio define the reusable logo-mark mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
